---
title: "Illustration Portfolio"
---

[image]
[text]

------------------------------------------------------------------------

## **On-Campus Business**
#### Austin, TX
#### Fall 2024 - Present
[image]
[text]

## **Women in Data & Statistics Merch Designer**
#### Austin, TX
#### Spring 2026 - Present
[image]
[text]

## **Commissions for Clients**
#### Remote
#### Fall 2024 - Present
[image]
[text]


------------------------------------------------------------------------
